chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-937 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6530/2022 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ashiq, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Arshad Khan, advocate for the respondent Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG --------- Counsel for the petitioner files statement and seeks disposal of this petition as the same has become infructuous. Counsel for the respondent and learned AAG have no objection. Order accordingly. The petition is dismissed as withdrawn having become infructuous. JUDGE Nadir*
